band.name: Metallica
band.description: One of the biggest metal bands ever. Known for powerful riffs and iconic albums.

band.name: Iron Maiden
band.description: British heavy metal legends with epic storytelling and galloping basslines.

band.name: Slayer
band.description: Extreme thrash pioneers, fast tempos and aggressive sound.

band.name: Judas Priest
band.description: One of the most influential heavy metal bands. Leather, studs, and classic riffs.
